objective: Extend the existing governance bootstrap for Seek and Ponder so the governed Pages deploy wrapper can receive Cloudflare Pages credential names through approved generated-env surfaces.
scope_boundary: Modify the existing scripts/bootstrap-repo-env.sh Seek targets only.
Document the new Seek Cloudflare Pages env-name mapping in existing registry/progress surfaces.
Do not create a second credential loader, copy secret values, or deploy Cloudflare Pages from this governance lane.
out_of_scope: Changing Cloudflare token scopes or account settings.
Committing .env.shared, generated .env files, token values, Authorization headers, signed URLs, or screenshots.
Changing the reusable Pages deploy gate or verifier implementation.
Mutating downstream seek-and-ponder files from this governance lane.
research_summary: Seek PR #172 adopted a thin wrapper around the governance Pages deploy gate. The wrapper correctly requires CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_TOKEN by name and maps it to Wrangler's CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN process-local name, but the governance bootstrap Seek targets did not emit CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_TOKEN or CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID. Extending the existing bootstrap target prevents future inline export guidance while preserving the Secret Provisioning UX contract.

sprints.name: Seek Pages bootstrap env propagation
sprints.goal: Make the existing Seek bootstrap targets emit the Cloudflare Pages deploy variable names needed by the governed downstream wrapper.
tasks: Add CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID to the seek, seek-local, and seek-worktree generated env templates.
Use empty defaults for optional/unset Cloudflare variables so synthetic bootstrap contract tests do not fail under set -u.
Update feature/progress mirrors and preserve no-secret validation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Dry-run bootstrap output for seek, seek-local, and seek-worktree includes CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID by name with redacted or empty values only.
Provisioning evidence validator passes for all changed files.
Execution scope and Local CI Gate pass before merge.

specialist_reviews.focus: Avoid adding another secret provisioning mechanism.
specialist_reviews.summary: The existing bootstrap tool is the right surface; extend it for the missing Seek Cloudflare Pages names.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: not required for scoped bootstrap env-name propagation
alternate_model_review.summary: This is a bounded extension of an existing bootstrap target under the approved #467/#471 Pages deploy adoption plan.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #471 may update bootstrap/env registry/progress evidence needed for the Seek governed Pages deploy adoption.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate, merge, then use the updated bootstrap to provision the temporary Seek deploy worktree for live proof.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: No generated env files or secret values are committed.

material_deviation_rules: If live deploy still lacks required names after bootstrap, stop and record the missing approved provisioning surface instead of using inline secret exports.
If Cloudflare API changes are needed, route to issue #472 or a new issue-backed Cloudflare inventory/adoption lane.
If downstream Seek code needs further edits, use seek-and-ponder#163, not this governance lane.
